zh.lifeSummary: 當Count of Eu Geoffrey Osbern or Osborne於0950年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Sir William FitzRobert (Assassinated)59歲，母親Wevia , Europäische Stammtäfeln II Aka Avelina (Crépon) de Bolebec-4歲。他於從0980年到1000年與Daughter of Fitzgorlin de Rouen在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利盧結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1015年在他的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Count of Eu Geoffrey Osbern or Osborne于0950年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Sir William FitzRobert (Assassinated)59岁，母亲Wevia , Europäische Stammtäfeln II Aka Avelina (Crépon) de Bolebec-4岁。他于从0980年到1000年与Daughter of Fitzgorlin de Rouen在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利盧结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1015年在他的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Osbern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Osborne  .

variants.name: Osborne
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osbern, partly from late Old English Ōsbern, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Ásbiǫrn (from áss ‘god’ + biǫrn ‘bear’), but more usually from Norman use of the cognate ancient Germanic Ōsbern. Osbern was often treated as an alternative form of Osbert. For pet forms see Hoskin and Opie . The surname has also been established in Ireland (Waterford, Tipperary) since the mid 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).
Chinese: variant of   Ge  .

nameMeanings.name: Osborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osbern, partly from late Old English Ōsbern, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Ásbiǫrn (from áss ‘god’ + biǫrn ‘bear’), but more usually from Norman use of the cognate ancient Germanic Ōsbern. Osbern was often treated as an alternative form of Osbert. For pet forms see Hoskin and Opie . The surname has also been established in Ireland (Waterford, Tipperary) since the mid 16th century.

meanings: English: variant of   Osborne  .

variants.name: Oborne
meanings: English:
habitational name from Oborne in Dorset. The placename derives from Old English wōh ‘twisted, crooked’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.
possibly from the Middle English personal name Obern, an Anglo-Norman French form of Osbern (see Osborne ).

variants.name: Orsburn
meanings: English: variant of   Osborne  .

variants.name: Osbun
meanings: English: variant of   Osborne  .

variants.name: Hoskin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osekin with prosthetic H-, a pet form of Anglo-Norman French names beginning with Os- (particularly Osbert, as well as Osbern, and Osmund) + the Flemish diminutive suffix -kin. All three personal names were current in medieval Cornwall or Devon; see Osborne , Osmond , and Opie (a pet form of Osbert). Old English Ōsbeorn, Ōsbeohrt, and Ōsmund may also have contributed in a minor way to Middle English usage; Middle English Oswald is another possible source, but the name was very rare in the late 14th century. For the excrescent initial H-, compare Herrick .

variants.name: Osborn
meanings: English: variant of   Osborne  .

variants.name: Orsborn
meanings: English: variant of   Osborne  .

variants.name: Oborn
meanings: English (Somerset): habitational name chiefly from Oborne in Dorset, or perhaps occasionally from Howbourne Farm in Hadlow Down, Sussex, Woburn in Bedfordshire, Woburn Park in Surrey, or Wooburn in Buckinghamshire. The placenames derive from Old English wōh ‘twisted, crooked’ + burna ‘spring, stream’, except Wooburn in Buckinghamshire, which is of uncertain etymology.
English (of Norman origin): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Obern, an Anglo-Norman French form of Osbern (see Osborne ).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Count of Eu Geoffrey Osbern or Osborne was born in 0950, in Normandy, France, his father, Sir William FitzRobert (Assassinated), was 59 and his mother, Wevia , Europäische Stammtäfeln II Aka Avelina (Crépon) de Bolebec, was -4. He married Daughter of Fitzgorlin de Rouen from 0980 to 1000, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1015, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count of Eu Geoffrey Osbern or Osborne est né en 0950, à Normandie, France, son père, Sir William FitzRobert (Assassinated), avait 59 ans et sa mère, Wevia , Europäische Stammtäfeln II Aka Avelina (Crépon) de Bolebec, avait -4 ans. Il a épousé Daughter of Fitzgorlin de Rouen du 0980 au 1000, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1015, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Count of Eu Geoffrey Osbern or Osborne 0950 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William FitzRobert (Assassinated) 59 und seine Mutter Wevia , Europäische Stammtäfeln II Aka Avelina (Crépon) de Bolebec -4. Er hat von 0980 bis 1000 in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich Daughter of Fitzgorlin de Rouen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1015 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count of Eu Geoffrey Osbern or Osborne è nato il nel 0950 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Sir William FitzRobert (Assassinated), aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Wevia , Europäische Stammtäfeln II Aka Avelina (Crépon) de Bolebec, aveva -4 anni. Lui sposato Daughter of Fitzgorlin de Rouen da 0980 a 1000, nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1015, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Count of Eu Geoffrey Osbern or Osborneが0950年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Sir William FitzRobert (Assassinated)は59歳，母Wevia , Europäische Stammtäfeln II Aka Avelina (Crépon) de Bolebecは-4歳であった。から0980年まで1000年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンでDaughter of Fitzgorlin de Rouenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1015年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Count of Eu Geoffrey Osbern or Osborne(이)가 0950년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William FitzRobert (Assassinated)(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Wevia , Europäische Stammtäfeln II Aka Avelina (Crépon) de Bolebec(은)는 -4세였다. 그는 0980년 부터 1000년 까지 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 Daughter of Fitzgorlin de Rouen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1015년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count of Eu Geoffrey Osbern or Osborne nasceu em 0950, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Sir William FitzRobert (Assassinated), tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Wevia , Europäische Stammtäfeln II Aka Avelina (Crépon) de Bolebec, tinha -4 anos. Ele casou-se com Daughter of Fitzgorlin de Rouen de 0980 a 1000, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1015, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count of Eu Geoffrey Osbern or Osborne родился в 0950 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir William FitzRobert (Assassinated) было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Wevia , Europäische Stammtäfeln II Aka Avelina (Crépon) de Bolebec, -4. Он женился на женщине по имени Daughter of Fitzgorlin de Rouen с 0980 по 1000 в местности роуен, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1015 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.
